auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Dub API key sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Create or view API keys in the Dub workspace settings: https://dub.co/docs/api-reference/authentication#api-keys.

actions.name: count_links
actions.description: Retrieve the number of matching links in the authenticated Dub workspace.

domain.description: Only count links for this domain.

anyOf.description: A Dub tag ID.
Dub tag IDs.

tagIds.description: Only count links with these tag IDs.

anyOf.description: A Dub tag name.
Dub tag names.

tagNames.description: Only count links with these tag names.

folderId.description: Only count links in this folder.

search.description: Search against link slugs and destination URLs.

userId.description: Only count links created by this Dub user ID.

tenantId.description: Only count links for this tenant ID.

showArchived.description: Whether archived links should be included.

count.description: The number of matching Dub links.

actions.name: create_folder
actions.description: Create a folder in the authenticated Dub workspace.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Dub folder.

id.description: The unique ID of the folder.

anyOf.description: The folder access level returned by Dub.

actions.name: create_link
actions.description: Create a short link in the authenticated Dub workspace.

url.description: The destination URL of the short link.

keyLength.description: The length of the generated short-link slug.

anyOf.description: The ID of the link in your database.
The tenant ID that created the link in your system.
The partner program ID associated with the link.
The partner ID associated with the link.

prefix.description: The prefix used for randomly generated slugs.

trackConversion.description: Whether Dub should track conversions for this link.

archived.description: Whether the link should be archived.

anyOf.description: A Dub tag ID.
Dub tag IDs assigned to the link.

tagIds.description: The tag IDs assigned to the link.

anyOf.description: A Dub tag name.
Dub tag names assigned to the link.

tagNames.description: The tag names assigned to the link.

anyOf.description: The folder ID assigned to the link.
Comments for the link.
The ISO-8601 timestamp when the link expires.
The URL used when the short link has expired.
The password required to access the destination URL.

proxy.description: Whether the link uses Dub custom link previews.

anyOf.description: The custom link preview title.
The custom link preview description.
The custom link preview image URL.
The custom link preview video URL.

rewrite.description: Whether the link uses link cloaking.

anyOf.description: The iOS destination URL for device targeting.
The Android destination URL for device targeting.

additionalProperties.description: The destination URL for this country.

anyOf.description: Geo targeting destinations keyed by country code.

doIndex.description: Whether search engines may index the short link.

anyOf.description: The UTM source to apply to the destination URL.
The UTM medium to apply to the destination URL.
The UTM campaign to apply to the destination URL.
The UTM term to apply to the destination URL.
The UTM content to apply to the destination URL.
The referral query parameter to apply to the destination URL.
Webhook IDs to trigger when the link is clicked.

percentage.description: The traffic percentage for this variant.

anyOf.description: A/B test URL variants for the short link.
The ISO-8601 timestamp when A/B testing started.
The ISO-8601 timestamp when A/B testing completes.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Dub link.

id.description: The unique ID of the Dub link.

domain.description: The domain of the short link.

url.description: The destination URL of the link.

anyOf.description: The full short-link URL.
The QR code URL for the short link.
The custom link preview title.
Whether the link is archived.
The number of recorded clicks.
The number of generated leads.
The number of generated sales.
The total sales amount in cents.
The timestamp when the link was created.
The timestamp when the link was last updated.

link.description: A normalized Dub link returned by the connector.

actions.name: create_tag
actions.description: Create a tag in the authenticated Dub workspace.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Dub tag.

id.description: The unique ID of the tag.

anyOf.description: The tag color.

actions.name: delete_folder
actions.description: Delete a folder from the authenticated Dub workspace.

id.description: The Dub folder ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: Identifier for deleting a Dub folder.

deleted.description: Whether the connector completed the delete request.

anyOf.description: The raw Dub deletion response, if any.

actions.name: delete_link
actions.description: Delete a short link from the authenticated Dub workspace.

linkId.description: The Dub link ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: Identifier for deleting a Dub link.

deleted.description: Whether the connector completed the delete request.

anyOf.description: The raw Dub deletion response, if any.

actions.name: delete_tag
actions.description: Delete a tag from the authenticated Dub workspace.

id.description: The Dub tag ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: Identifier for deleting a Dub tag.

deleted.description: Whether the connector completed the delete request.

anyOf.description: The raw Dub deletion response, if any.

actions.name: retrieve_analytics
actions.description: Retrieve analytics for a Dub link, domain, or workspace.

event.description: The event metric to retrieve from Dub analytics.

groupBy.description: The dimension used to group Dub analytics.

key.description: The link slug used with a domain filter.

start.description: The start timestamp for the analytics range.

end.description: The end timestamp for the analytics range.

timezone.description: The IANA time zone used to align timeseries buckets.

country.description: The country filter using ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes.

data.description: The analytics data returned by Dub.

actions.name: retrieve_link
actions.description: Retrieve a Dub short link by ID or by supported lookup fields.

linkId.description: The Dub link ID to retrieve.

domain.description: The short-link domain used with key lookup.

key.description: The short-link slug used with domain lookup.

externalId.description: The external ID for the link. Prefix with ext_ when required by Dub.

id.description: The unique ID of the Dub link.

domain.description: The domain of the short link.
